{{Quote|Research is critical!|Hoole, to Zak and Tash Arranda|<ref name="Grave Digger" />}}
'''Hoole''' was a researcher who looked after [[Zak Arranda|Zak]] and [[Tash Arranda]]. The Arrandas, alongside a [[Hoole's droid|droid]], assisted him in his work. On one occasion, Hoole tasked his charges with studying [[Spice spider|energy spiders]], though the two were disinterested, wishing to instead research the [[Jedi Knight]]s. Hoole insisted that the [[spider]]s were dangerous and that research was critical, insisting that they complete the task. The two Arrandas sneaked away during the night while Hoole was [[Sleep|asleep]] to investigate a nearby [[cave]], where they had a run-in with a group of cultists.<ref name="Grave Digger" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the new ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]], Hoole first appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] "[[Tales of Villainy: Grave Digger]]," written by [[Dave Scheidt]], illustrated by [[Stefano Simeone]], and published in [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 10|''Star Wars Adventures'' 10]] by [[IDW Publishing]]<ref name="Grave Digger" /> on [[September 29]], [[2021]].<ref name="Comixology">{{Comixology|url=Star-Wars-Adventures-2020-10/digital-comic/929277|text=Star Wars Adventures (2020-) #10}}</ref> [[Mammon Hoole]] previously featured alongside [[Zak Arranda/Legends|Zak]] and [[Tash Arranda/Legends|Tash Arranda]] in the novel series ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Fear]]'', written by [[John Whitman]].<ref name="Eaten Alive">''[[Galaxy of Fear: Eaten Alive]]''</ref>
